AI Strategy for Women Leaders

AI is changing everything. Don't get left behind.

Former Microsoft CTO helping women leaders understand, adopt, and lead with AI. From boardroom strategy to hands-on implementation.

25 Years
Microsoft Former CTO
Intel Chief of Staff to CEO
IDEX Board Director
DoD Digital Logic Designer

Most AI consulting is built by men, for men, in language that doesn't land.

I've sat in the rooms where AI decisions get made. I've watched women leaders get talked over, confused by jargon, and pushed to the sidelines of the most important technology shift in our lifetime.

76% of AI professionals are men
$15T AI economic impact by 2030
3x more likely to adopt with guidance

AI Services Built for Women Leaders

Not generic consulting. Strategy, implementation, and coaching designed for women navigating corporate, board, and entrepreneurial growth.

🎯

AI Strategy for Boards

Help your board understand AI risk, opportunity, and governance in plain language. Translate technical complexity into strategic decisions.

Quarterly Engagement
👩‍💼

Executive AI Coaching

One-on-one coaching for women executives adopting AI. Build confidence, cut through vendor hype, and lead with authority.

6-Month Program
⚡

AI Implementation Sprints

2-4 week hands-on sprints to get your team using AI tools that actually move the needle. Not theory. Results.

2-4 Week Sprint
👥

Women's AI Leadership Circle

Small cohort of women leaders navigating AI together. Monthly sessions, peer support, and direct access to me.

8-12 Women
"Lakecia helped our board understand AI in language we could actually act on. Not buzzwords. Clear decisions."
